# Rams Driving Academy

> Adelaide driving school with 20+ years of experience. Patient, expert driving lessons for learners, international licence holders converting to a South Australian licence, and licensed drivers wanting a refresher. Bookings are made by WhatsApp or phone on +61 432 065 741.

## Services and prices (AUD)
- Learner to P Licence Training: $110 per lesson. Step by step training from L plates through to passing the VORT or CBT&A in South Australia. Logbook hours signed off.
- International Licence Conversion Training: $115 per lesson. Coaching for overseas licence holders (popular with students and workers from South Asia and around the world) converting to a SA licence.
- Refresher Driving Lessons: $100 per lesson. For licensed drivers building confidence, overcoming driving anxiety, or mastering Adelaide CBD and highway traffic.
- Test Day Support and Car Hire: quoted on enquiry. Take the practical test in a fully insured, dual control academy vehicle with a warm up lesson beforehand.

## Key facts
- Location: Adelaide, South Australia. Lessons across the wider Adelaide metro area.
- Experience: over 20 years teaching on Adelaide roads.
- Vehicles: modern automatic dual control cars, fully insured, the same car used for lessons and the driving test.
- Transmission: automatic lessons only.
- Languages: English, Tamil and Hindi spoken.
- Availability: lessons 7 days a week.
- Payment: bank transfer, PayID or cash on the day. No lock in packages.
- Booking: WhatsApp https://wa.me/61432065741 or phone +61 432 065 741. No online forms required.

## Common questions
- VORT vs CBT&A: VORT is a single practical test; CBT&A is a competency based logbook pathway with no final test. The academy trains and assesses for both.
- Overseas drivers usually need only a few tailored lessons before their practical test, depending on experience.
- Nervous and anxious drivers are welcome; lessons are paced individually in a judgement free environment.
